final:
module ALU_16bit(  
    input [15:0] obf_A,  
    input [15:0] B,  
    input [1:0] opcode,  
    output reg [15:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case(opcode)  
            2'b00: result = obf_A + B;      // Addition  
            2'b01: result = obf_A - B;      // Subtraction  
            2'b10: result = obf_A & B;      // Bitwise AND  
            default: result = 16'b0;     // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
